mapper.sql: select id, kb_id, doc_logical_key, file_ext, file_size_bytes, content_sha256, update_time from rag_document_hash
mapper.insert: insert into rag_document_hash (kb_id, doc_logical_key, file_ext, file_size_bytes, content_sha256, update_time) values (#{kbId}, #{docLogicalKey}, #{fileExt}, #{fileSizeBytes}, #{contentSha256}, now()) on duplicate key update content_sha256 = values(content_sha256), file_ext = values(file_ext), file_size_bytes = values(file_size_bytes), update_time = now()
mapper.delete: delete from rag_document_hash where kb_id = #{kbId} and doc_logical_key = #{docLogicalKey}
